pr_title: feat: add keep-core/keep-secondary classification to deduplicate_levers
pr_description: Split the single `keep` classification into `keep-core` (essential strategic levers — methodology, governance, high-stakes execution) and `keep-secondary` (supporting/operational — communications, presentation, routine process) Both classifications survive deduplication; the new `classification` field flows downstream for prioritization by `vital_few_levers` Backwards-compatible: `enrich_potential_levers.py` accepts the new field as optional
